title: Savory Creamy Romantic Fold Chinese Cabbage
description: A savory and creamy dish featuring folded Chinese cabbage leaves infused with a rich cream sauce for an ethically inspired meal that's both comforting and light.

ingredients.name: Optional: 2 tablespoons of olive oil
ingredients.notes: To help with the folding process

instructions: Wash and dry the Chinese Cabbage leaves, then use a sharp knife to cut them into smaller, manageable pieces. Keep any large stems separate for later use.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat until fully melted. Add the minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute, stirring constantly to avoid burning.

Add the heavy cream, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan with the butter and garlic. Stir well and bring the mixture to a simmer. Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer gently for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened but still pourable. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed; the sauce should be creamy yet not overly salty.

While the cream sauce simmers, spread some of the parmesan cheese on each folded cabbage leaf, if using any. Fold the leaves with care to ensure they’re secure before adding them to a baking dish or casserole that’s been lightly buttered.

Pour the creamy sauce over the folded cabbage leaves and place in the preheated oven for about 15 minutes, or until the cheese is fully melted and bubbly. You can also cook uncovered if you prefer a more caramelized top layer without any additional sauce on top.

Remove from heat immediately after cooking to avoid burning the cheese, then garnish with additional parmesan cheese if desired. Serve warm as an accompaniment to your main meal or as a light dish on its own.
